display.purpose: Hero headline only, one per page. Bricolage Grotesque, tight tracking.

title.purpose: Card, list-item, role, and project titles.

label.purpose: Uppercase amber kicker above section titles.

shadows.name: ambient-amber-glow
shadows.purpose: Atmospheric glow behind the signature panel and at the page top. Never structural.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default reveal and transition easing. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: reveal-up
motion.purpose: Scroll-in reveal for sections and staggered children.

motion.name: lift-hover
motion.purpose: Buttons and nav links lift on hover.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main call to action (Contact, Send message).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(80% 0.15 72); color: oklch(15% 0.012 70); padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(86% 0.085 88); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(95% 0.01 85); padding: 12px 24px; border: 1px solid oklch(41% 0.022 70); border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: oklch(80% 0.15 72); border-color: oklch(80% 0.15 72); transform: translateY(-2px); }

components.name: Skill Chip
components.description: Technology tag in the skills grid.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; background: oklch(20.5% 0.015 70); color: oklch(79% 0.012 80); border: 1px solid oklch(30% 0.015 70); border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-chip:hover { color: oklch(80% 0.15 72); border-color: oklch(80% 0.15 72); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard raised container (project, education, contact panels).
components.html:
Direct channels

Email, phone, and WhatsApp routes.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(20.5% 0.015 70); border: 1px solid oklch(30% 0.015 70); border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: oklch(80% 0.15 72 / 0.7); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(95% 0.01 85); margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(64% 0.014 75); line-height: 1.75; margin: 16px 0 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: oklch(18.5% 0.015 70); color: oklch(95% 0.01 85); border: 1px solid oklch(30% 0.015 70); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(64% 0.014 75); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(80% 0.15 72); }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed top bar, transparent until scrolled.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 64px; padding: 0 24px; background: oklch(15% 0.012 70 / 0.9); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(30% 0.015 70); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); } .ds-nav-logo { border: 1px solid oklch(41% 0.022 70); border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(95% 0.01 85); transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-logo:hover { color: oklch(80% 0.15 72); border-color: oklch(80% 0.15 72); } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(64% 0.014 75); cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(95% 0.01 85); transform: translateY(-2px); }

components.name: AI Workshop Panel Cell
components.description: One numbered tool cell from the signature 'How I work now' panel. Cells sit in a gap-px grid so 1px borders read as seams, not separate cards.
components.html:
01

Claude Code

Agentic refactors and PR-ready changes across large codebases.
components.css: .ds-ai-cell { background: oklch(20.5% 0.015 70); padding: 24px; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-ai-cell:hover { background: oklch(24% 0.017 70); } .ds-ai-index { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(80% 0.15 72); } .ds-ai-name { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(95% 0.01 85); margin: 16px 0 0; } .ds-ai-use { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.75; color: oklch(64% 0.014 75); margin: 12px 0 0; }

narrative.overview: The late-evening workspace of a senior engineer who builds things that last: warm, low-lit, an amber lamp throwing a soft glow across a dark surface with faint material grain under everything. Crafted and editorial, never neon, never corporate. It rejects the default developer-portfolio look: no cold blue-black, no electric-blue accent, no endless icon-card grids. Depth comes from warm tonal layering, not shadows, and the single amber accent is rationed so it still means something.
keyCharacteristics: Warm amber-tinted dark, never cold blue-black
One rationed accent (amber), carrying identity without shouting
Display grotesque headings paired with a clean humanist body
Editorial layouts (numbered lists, dividers) over card grids
Subtle physical texture: ambient glow plus low-opacity film grain

rules.name: The Single Voice Rule
rules.body: Amber Ember is the only saturated accent on any screen and stays under ~10% of the surface. Never introduce a second competing accent hue; reach for Warm Cream or a neutral instead.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: No pure black, no pure white, no untinted grey. Every neutral carries low chroma (0.01-0.02) toward hue 70-85.

rules.name: The Display-For-Identity Rule
rules.body: Bricolage Grotesque appears on headings only. Body, labels, buttons, and UI text stay on Inter.

rules.name: The Tight-Heading Rule
rules.body: Display and headline type always carry -0.02em tracking and line-height at or below 1.05.

rules.name: The Tonal-Depth Rule
rules.body: Layer surfaces by lightness, not by shadow. Structural box-shadows are forbidden; the only shadow is the soft atmospheric amber glow.

dos: Do keep Amber Ember as the only saturated accent, under ~10% of any screen.
Do tint every neutral toward hue 70-85 with low chroma. Warm near-black and warm off-white only.
Do set every heading in Bricolage Grotesque via .font-display, with -0.02em tracking and line-height at or below 1.05.
Do convey depth through tonal layering and warm borders, not shadows.
Do reach for a numbered list, a divider, or bare layout before a card.
Do keep body measure at 65-75ch and section rhythm at 96px.
donts: Don't reintroduce the cold dev-portfolio look: no #0a0a0a blue-black, no electric-blue accent, no system-ui-only type.
Don't build identical icon + heading + text card grids.
Don't add a second saturated accent hue; use Warm Cream or a neutral for variety.
Don't use structural drop shadows to lift elements.
Don't set body copy in the display face or stretch headings with default/loose tracking.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism.
